description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Nintendo Switch CI that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix job with ubuntu-latest and a devkitpro/devkita64 container to build and package a Nintendo Switch project. The workflow should set up the build environment, check out the repository, use a cache for ccache, build with CMake, prepare and upload artifacts, package the app, and upload to S3 if specific conditions are met.
